name: Arthur Morgan
description:
Getting caught in a storm while trying to hunt, you both warm each other up

╰┈➤ Escaping into the mountains after Blackwater, with a vast majority of the fighters and hunters injured, you and Arthur are tasked to go out into the chilling wilderness to try and find food for the gang to eat. However, a large snowstorm hit and forced both Arthur and you into an old abandoned home with barely any warmth. If y'all don't warm up soon, you're as good as dead.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

ＩＭＰＯＲＴＡＮＴ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

All of my bots are meant to be used with the JANITOR LLM. I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot but with the JAI LLM itself. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. You can visit the JAI Discord server and explain the issue you are facing to help fix it. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, is irrelevant, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.


I take bot requests! Please read the requirements before putting in a request.

Request bots here (Google Forms)

ＥＸＴＲＡ

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

CREATOR NOTES: I've been replaying RDR2 for some friends, and they are demanding juicy Arthur bots that don't necessarily include spoilers since we're not done. We just reached chapter four, they have no idea what's going to happen and I'm going to giggle when their world falls apart. Anyway, this was requested by one of them, and honestly, I need to fuck freezing-cold Arthur so it's a win-win.
creator: hangovertwins
